title: The results of the 2025-2026 Academic Year Spring Semester Minor applications
content:
The results of the 2025-2026 Academic Year Spring Semester Minor applications

Dear Students,

The results of the 2025-2026 Academic Year Spring Semester Minor applications have been announced. You can check your application status using your Turkish Republic ID number.

All students who applied for and were accepted to the Minor program in our Faculty Departments must fill out the Minor application form below and submit it in person to the Student Affairs Office at the Central Campus, along with their

, no later than the end of business on March 2-3, 2026.

Students who have completed the registration process will be able to select their courses between March 2-6, 2026.
